name: Touko Usagihara

name: Tsugumi Hazawa

name: Tsukiko Sagi
description: One of the central characters of the series, she is a famous, but timid, character designer best known for a cartoonish dog named Maromi. She carries a plush toy copy of Maromi everywhere. She is Shounen Bat's first apparent victim in the series, and the catalyst who jump-starts the plot.

name: Vert

She is known to be smart, and usually very calm and polite but one of the most immature members of the group. She also isn't as strong as she believes herself to be, but she does consider her people's needs and peace as top priority and wishes for nobody to be harmed. name: Aka Onda
description: An aspiring seiyuu who idolizes Audrey Hepburn. She is a little eccentric in her actions as she often quotes movie lines from films Audrey Hepburn starred in. She lives with Matsumaru in his apartment, and usually asserts that she is only friends with him, despite the fact she and Matsumaru slept together the first night they met. name: Anna Kobayakawa
description: Anna is a polite girl who's good at studies and who lives at her own pace. That is, until she meets Natsuki and finds herself spending more and more time with him. She's usually accompanied by her best friend Mari.

name: Cacao
description: Cacao (formerly Sugarcane, the name given by Azuki) is a stray cat found by Chocola when she went out to buy ponzu for tuna. Cacao followed Chocola until she arrived home. The Minaduki thought that this is a lost cat and they tried to find an owner for it but they couldn't find one. Now Cacao lives with Chocola and Vanilla in Kashou Minaduki's house because of Chocola's wish for her to stay there. "Cacao" is a name chosen by Shigure Minaduki and the Minaduki cat-girls later on.

description: Self proclaimed fiancée of Takeru Ooyama. She feels strongly for Takeru Ooyama, and although he doesn't remember her much she has decided to wait until he fully does.
